name: THE KULKA
description: MUTATE YOUR BULLET. FLAP, EVOLVE, SURVIVE. THE KULKA is a one-button bullet-heaven arcade game where your single shot evolves into chaos. Inspired by Flappy Birds, Vampire Survivor and Pattern Survivors: Bullet Hell.
instructions: 1 Click or tap to flap and dodge 2 Collect XP gems from destroyed enemies 3 Choose an upgrade when you level up 4 Survive as long as possible
